name: Industrial Property Inspection
description: Commercial industrial property condition assessment — includes loading docks, overhead crane equipment, and hazardous materials storage.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Grading & Drainage was inspected and appears in serviceable condition.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible, accessible components at the time of inspection.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Grading & Drainage requires repair or further evaluation by a qualified professional.

defects.title: Repair needed

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Dock doors were inspected and appear in serviceable condition. Overhead doors operate smoothly with functional safety mechanisms.

information.title: Insulated doors
information.comment: Dock doors are insulated and equipped with perimeter weather seals.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible door panels, tracks, and hardware; motor internals not tested.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Dock doors require repair — damaged panels, worn seals, or malfunctioning opener observed.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Dock door presents a safety hazard due to failed safety reversal or broken cable; recommend immediate lock-out and repair.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Dock levelers were inspected and appear in serviceable condition. Lip extends and retracts properly.

information.title: Hydraulic operation
information.comment: Hydraulic dock levelers operate smoothly with no visible fluid leaks.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to surface operation; hydraulic cylinders and pit conditions below deck not fully accessible.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Dock levelers show wear, hydraulic leaks, or lip malfunction; recommend service by a loading dock equipment specialist.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Dock area lighting was inspected and appears adequate for safe loading and unloading operations.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible light fixtures and general illumination levels.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Dock lighting is insufficient or fixtures are damaged; recommend replacement for safe loading operations.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Dock area has inadequate lighting creating a safety hazard for personnel; recommend immediate correction.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Overhead crane runway rails and support structure were inspected and appear in serviceable condition. Rail alignment appears adequate.

information.title: End stops present
information.comment: Crane runway end stops are present and securely mounted at both ends of each rail.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to ground-level visual observation; rail alignment survey and structural load testing not performed.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Crane rails show misalignment, worn surfaces, or loose fasteners; recommend evaluation by a crane service engineer.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Crane rail deficiency presents a safety hazard; recommend immediate lock-out and engineering evaluation.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Overhead crane bridge, trolley, and hoist were visually inspected and appear in serviceable condition. Annual inspection tag is current.

information.title: Rated capacity
information.comment: Crane rated capacity is clearly posted and legible on the bridge.

information.title: Current inspection
information.comment: Crane has a current annual inspection per OSHA 1910.179 / ASME B30.2.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to ground-level visual observation; load testing, brake testing, and electrical inspection not performed.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Crane shows wear, corrosion, or missing inspection documentation; recommend service by a certified crane inspector.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Crane presents a safety hazard due to structural deterioration, lapsed inspection, or missing capacity rating; recommend immediate lock-out.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Crane control pendant/radio and disconnect were inspected and appear in serviceable condition. Emergency stop is functional.

information.title: Lockout present
information.comment: Crane main disconnect is equipped with lockout/tagout provisions per OSHA requirements.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible controls and disconnect; internal electrical components not opened or tested.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Crane controls show worn buttons, damaged pendant cord, or intermittent operation; recommend service by a qualified crane electrician.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Crane controls present a safety hazard due to non-functional emergency stop or missing lockout provisions; recommend immediate correction.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Secondary containment systems — berms, dikes, and containment pallets — were inspected and appear in serviceable condition with adequate capacity.

information.title: SPCC plan posted
information.comment: Spill Prevention, Control, and Countermeasure (SPCC) plan is posted and appears current.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible containment structures; liner integrity and capacity calculations not verified.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Secondary containment shows cracks, deterioration, or inadequate capacity; recommend repair and capacity verification.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Secondary containment is compromised or absent, creating an environmental release risk; recommend immediate correction.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Hazardous materials storage area ventilation was inspected and appears to provide adequate air exchange for stored materials.

information.title: Explosion-proof
information.comment: Ventilation equipment in hazmat storage area is explosion-proof rated per NEC classification.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible ventilation equipment; air change rate calculations and gas monitoring not performed.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Hazmat storage ventilation is inadequate or equipment shows deterioration; recommend evaluation by a mechanical engineer.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Hazmat storage ventilation failure creates a toxic exposure or explosion risk; recommend immediate lock-out and remediation.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Hazardous materials signage — NFPA diamonds, GHS labels, and SDS station — was inspected and appears current and legible.

information.title: SDS available
information.comment: Safety Data Sheets are maintained at a clearly marked station accessible to all personnel.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible signage and labeling; SDS completeness and regulatory compliance not audited.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Hazmat signage is faded, missing, or inaccurate; recommend updating labels and NFPA diamonds per current inventory.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Missing or inaccurate hazmat signage creates a first-responder safety risk; recommend immediate correction.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Office area floors were inspected and appear in serviceable condition.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible, accessible components at the time of inspection.

defects.title: Repair needed
